required_fields.executive_brief: A concise architectural overview explaining the core value, host platform, and data pattern (e.g., client-side storage, stateless API). Strict limit: 30 to 150 words.

technical_stack.languages_and_frameworks: List of core runtimes, frameworks, and testing tools explicitly named in the parsed documentation.
technical_stack.architectural_constraints: List of physical boundaries: validation thresholds, accessibility requirements (WCAG), or specific routing paradigms.

required_fields.maturity_assessment: A deep professional judgment on the stability of the specifications. Must highlight logical coherence and technical readiness without parroting raw scores.
required_fields.critical_dependencies: External systems, SDKs, specific environment variables, and non-negotiable workflow gates (such as pre-commit hooks, linting rules, or mandatory branch protection policies).
